ddls:
CREATE TABLE "merchant_types" (
  "merchant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant type */,
  "merchant_type" TEXT /* Type of merchant (e.g., reseller, manufacturer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_segments" (
  "business_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business segment */,
  "business_segment" TEXT /* Business segment (e.g., pet, car accessories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_types" (
  "lead_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead type */,
  "lead_type" TEXT /* Type of lead (e.g., online_medium, industry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_behaviour_profiles" (
  "lead_behaviour_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead behavior profile */,
  "lead_behaviour_profile" TEXT /* Lead behavior profile (e.g., cat, wolf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_behaviour_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "seller_id" TEXT /* Unique seller ID for the merchant */,
  "business_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business segment */,
  "merchant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant type */,
  "lead_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead type */,
  "lead_behaviour_profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead behavior profile */,
  "product_catalog_size" INTEGER /* Declared product catalog size for the merchant */,
  "monthly_revenue" INTEGER /* Declared monthly revenue for the merchant */,
  "average_stock_level" INTEGER /* Average stock level of the merchant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchants_business_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_segment_id") REFERENCES business_segments ("business_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchants_merchant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_type_id") REFERENCES merchant_types ("merchant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchants_lead_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_type_id") REFERENCES lead_types ("lead_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchants_lead_behaviour_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_behaviour_profile_id") REFERENCES lead_behaviour_profiles ("lead_behaviour_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sdrs" (
  "sdr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SDR */,
  "sdr_name" TEXT /* Full name of the SDR */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the SDR */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SDR was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SDR was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sdr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srs" (
  "sr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SR */,
  "sr_name" TEXT /* Full name of the SR */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the SR */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SR was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SR was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant */,
  "sdr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SDR */,
  "sr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SR */,
  "won_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was won */,
  "declared_product_catalog_size" INTEGER /* Declared product catalog size for the merchant */,
  "declared_monthly_revenue" INTEGER /* Declared monthly revenue for the merchant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sr_id FOREIGN KEY ("sr_id") REFERENCES srs ("sr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sdr_id FOREIGN KEY ("sdr_id") REFERENCES sdrs ("sdr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., sales team, merchant manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
